freeze.reason: staging split for real-project seeds; promotion to clean60 requires 60 admitted cases, final independent review, and prompt freeze

selection_protocol.case_source_policy: Stage only real-project seeds with upstream project, commit, path, and license provenance.
selection_protocol.admission_order_policy: Review and smoke candidates before any clean LLM evaluation; promotion to clean60 happens only after the full 60-case split is assembled.
selection_protocol.review_policy: Require independent review of every candidate's bug, oracle coverage, provenance, and clean-split eligibility before promotion.
selection_protocol.model_result_blinding_policy: Do not run or inspect source-only, raw, trimmed-raw, or structured repair outcomes while admitting or excluding candidates.
selection_protocol.near_duplicate_policy: Reject semantic near-duplicates of dev40, bpfix-bench replay cases, or already staged candidates even when exact file hashes differ.

candidate_seed_ledger.notes: Minimized the process-event ringbuf reserve/fill/submit pattern into a deterministic TC harness; no LLM repair outcomes were used for admission.
Minimized the map-backed policy decision and branch-merge proof shape into a deterministic TC harness; no LLM repair outcomes were used for admission.

Minimized the Cilium overlay datapath packet-revalidation pattern into a deterministic TC harness that concretizes the invalidating helper with bpf_skb_change_proto; no LLM repair outcomes were used for admission.

seed_exclusion_ledger.notes: Rejected before admission because the file lives in a nested kernel submodule and the default provenance gate cannot verify it from the namei_ext top-level pinned ref/path; no LLM repair outcomes were inspected.

cases.origin: real-project seed from agentsight process tracer ring-buffer event emission

review.bug_summary: The program writes a reserved process_event before proving bpf_ringbuf_reserve returned non-null.
review.oracle_rationale: The oracle requires compile, verifier load, TC functional returns, bpf_ringbuf_reserve/submit presence, and a successful-verifier proof predicate that the same 16-byte ringbuf record has mark=7 written at offset 12 before submit.
review.provenance_rationale: Seed was derived from agentsight process.bpf.c ringbuf event emission and minimized into a deterministic TC harness; README and manifest distinguish this from an original TC bug.

provenance.seed_type: minimized real-project seed in deterministic TC harness
provenance.minimization: Preserved ringbuf reserve/fill/submit process-event shape while replacing tracepoint context with a deterministic TC packet harness.

functional_semantics: repair must keep process-event ringbuf submit path
verifier_reject_reason: buggy program writes to the ringbuf record before a null check
success_criteria: bpftool prog run returns the expected TC actions
successful verifier log shows a 16-byte ringbuf_mem record with mark=7 stored at offset 12 before bpf_ringbuf_submit

cases.origin: real-project seed from ActPlane map-backed policy state and branch-dependent decision

review.bug_summary: The map lookup is proved non-null only on the IPv4 branch, then the same map-value pointer is read after a branch merge.
review.oracle_rationale: The oracle requires compile, verifier load, four TC functional tests with different configured drop_proto values, and successful-verifier predicates proving the repair keeps map-value read and state update behavior.
review.provenance_rationale: Seed was derived from ActPlane process.bpf.c policy/map state patterns and minimized into a deterministic TC harness; README and manifest distinguish this from an original TC bug.

provenance.seed_type: minimized real-project seed in deterministic TC harness
provenance.minimization: Preserved map-backed policy lookup, state update, and branch-dependent decision shape while replacing LSM/tracepoint context with a deterministic TC packet harness.

functional_semantics: packet action depends on the configured policy_map drop_proto value
verifier_reject_reason: buggy program reads policy->drop_proto after a branch merge where the non-null proof is not available on every path
success_criteria: bpftool prog run returns expected TC actions for IPv4 and ARP under two map configurations
successful verifier log shows drop_proto read from map value and seen_ipv4 state update

cases.origin: real-project seed from Cilium overlay datapath packet revalidation after packet rewrites

review.bug_summary: The program calls bpf_skb_change_proto and then writes through a stale pre-helper skb packet pointer.
review.oracle_rationale: The oracle requires compile, verifier load, three TC functional returns, bpf_skb_change_proto presence, and a successful-verifier proof predicate that the IPv4 ethertype is stored through a reloaded packet pointer after the helper.
review.provenance_rationale: Seed was derived from Cilium's overlay datapath pattern of revalidating packet data after packet rewrites; the harness concretizes that production provenance rule with bpf_skb_change_proto in a deterministic TC program.

provenance.seed_type: minimized real-project seed in deterministic TC harness
provenance.minimization: Preserved Cilium's production pattern of reacquiring and revalidating skb packet data/data_end after datapath rewrites while replacing the full overlay pipeline with a small bpf_skb_change_proto TC harness.

functional_semantics: IPv6 UDP packet returns TC_ACT_SHOT after the protocol rewrite path
repair must keep the post-helper Ethernet protocol rewrite
verifier_reject_reason: bpf_skb_change_proto invalidates existing skb packet pointers
buggy program writes eth->h_proto through the stale pre-helper packet pointer
success_criteria: bpftool prog run returns expected TC actions for IPv6 UDP, IPv6 TCP, and IPv4 packets
successful verifier log shows bpf_skb_change_proto and a later ethertype store through a reloaded packet pointer
